children.name: readme.txt
children.content:
Welcome to Call My Colleague · Windows.

This is a fake OS. Nothing here is real. All your clicks are lies.

Try:
- Minesweeper (classic 9x9, 10 mines)
- MSN Messenger (double-click a buddy)
- The Meeting app, for that true 'am I on mute' feeling

Try not to:
- reply to the Nigerian prince
- show up to the HR session unprepared
- use the microwave (see kitchen)

children.name: project-notes.txt
children.content:
Project NOTES

- The thing with the thing is that the thing depends on another thing.
- If the other thing moves, this thing moves. Tell Dave. Dave never reads these.
- Aki suggested splitting into two things. Marco laughed. The laughter was load-bearing.

Decision log:
- We are not splitting. Yet.

children.name: diary.txt
children.content:
Dear Diary,

Today Dave said 'quick sync?' again. It was not quick.

I wonder what the ceiling looks like.

children.name: old-draft.txt
children.content: Hi team, I quit. Effective immediately. (draft — do not send)
